company.raw_notes: The homepage content provided directly from natanitsolutions.com is entirely WordPress boilerplate: 'Welcome to WordPress. This is your first post. Edit or delete it, then start writing!' plus Lorem Ipsum-style placeholder text. There is zero first-party content describing what the business does, who it serves, or what it offers. Web searches for 'natanitsolutions.com' and 'Natan IT Solutions' returned no matching results for this specific entity; all results were for unrelated companies (NAT IT Solutions, NAT solutions, Nathan IT Solutions Ltd UK, etc.). The email prefix 'hr@' may suggest the signee is in a human resources or administrative role, not necessarily a founder or technical lead.
